geography.data_source: BBMP ward boundaries 2023 for Yelahanka zone and parts of Dasarahalli zone; includes Hebbal, Yelahanka, Jakkur, Sahakara Nagar areas

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 ward-level data extrapolated with BBMP 2023 estimates for Yelahanka zone; rapid growth due to airport proximity and new residential development; SC/ST from Census 2011

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round PLFS for urban Karnataka; median income reflects mix of defense sector (HAL, BEL, DRDO Yelahanka) and growing residential areas; informal rate from ILO India Employment Report 2024

commute_profile.data_source: BMRCL Green Line Phase 2 extension to Airport under construction; DULT CMP 2020; BMTC route data 2023 for Hebbal-Yelahanka corridor; two-wheeler dominance from RTO registration data showing 68% two-wheeler share

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Moderate sensitivity profile — middle income with defense sector stability; examination sensitivity elevated due to student population near Yelahanka coaching centres; estimated from Lokniti-CSDS 2024 and NSSO consumption data

social_network_parameters.data_source: Moderate clustering from apartment complex RWAs and defense colony networks; estimated from IHDS-II urban residential social network patterns for Bangalore

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Hebbal flyover commercial cluster; BBMP trade license data 2023; footfall estimated from BMTC bus stop ridership data for Hebbal
Yelahanka old town market; BBMP vendor survey 2022; traditional market serving Air Force Station residential areas
Sahakara Nagar commercial area; BBMP trade license data 2023; residential catchment market

data_source: Composite zone config from Census 2011, NSSO PLFS 78th Round, BMRCL 2024, DULT CMP 2020, BMTC 2023, BBMP 2023, HAL/BEL/DRDO employment data, RTO Bangalore Urban 2023
